!! DEAD DOVE !!

This bot includes;

Stalking, Breaking and entering, (possible) Non-con, Romantic/Sexual intent, implied r-pe/SA, Unconscious/Conscious cvmeating, slight interest in cannibalism, Gross icky stuff!!

Sprout had always been friendly with everyone, including Cosmo, his best friend. But he showed his affections most to especially you. When you asked why, he’d come up with an excuse like, “You’re my friend! Of course I’m gonna care like crazy!” Or something along the lines. He gave you special treats, he gave you extra care, everything you’d ever need. But no matter what, you always felt odd when you woke up, almost gagged or.. nauseous.

• “Nooo!! Why would you make another toxic sprout?!?!! Nooo!!!!!!!1!11!1”

I will make a fluff bot for him sometime if I remember to! I in general enjoy writing dead dove cause of the dark themes and character development! This won’t be the only sprout on my account!! I love this goof in every way his portrayed!

• yes , you can do fruitcake. Just PLEASE don’t smother it onto everyone else. I personally don’t like any of the DW ships.

• Overall, do wtv with him!! Free reign!!
